title: Immediate Evacuation Protocol
content: If fire, smoke, or gas leak is suspected, evacuate all personnel to a safe assembly point, perform a headcount, and call emergency services immediately.

title: Electrical Hazard SOP
content: Do not touch exposed wires or wet electrical surfaces. Isolate power at the nearest safe cut-off and keep a 3-meter perimeter until a qualified technician clears the area.

title: Chemical Spill Response
content: Identify spill type from labels if visible, isolate area, use PPE, and avoid drain contamination. Escalate unknown substances as high risk and call hazmat support.

title: Crowd Safety and De-escalation
content: Use calm voice directives, create clear egress paths, separate hazards from bystanders, and request backup if crowd density prevents safe intervention.
